full_text:
Liu Li (Fengxiao) 劉理 (奉孝)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Li (劉理), styledFengxiao (奉孝), was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Third son of Liu Bei. Married to Ma Chao’s daughter. Liu Li was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Liu Li lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
